title: neltuma nigra var. longispina
intro: Neltuma nigra var. longispina, also known as the African stinkwood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its dark brown or black bark and fragrant, resinous wood. The medicinal properties of Neltuma nigra var. longispina include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Neltuma nigra var. longispina include infusions, decoctions, and resin extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from respiratory infections to skin conditions.
